---
name: engineering-principles
description: Index of architecture and implementation principles. Use for design, review, meaningful refactoring, architecture tests, data, integration, or operation.
---

# Engineering principles

Load only the references you need:

| When the task involves | Read |
| --- | --- |
| Policy, purpose, dependencies | `references/architecture-core.md` |
| Modules, components, boundaries | `references/components-boundaries.md` |
| Qualities, styles, decisions | `references/architecture-characteristics.md` |
| Data, APIs, events, distribution | `references/data-integration.md` |
| Tests and automated rules | `references/testing-fitness-functions.md` |
| Code clarity and maintainability | `references/implementation-clean-code.md` |
| Python development | `references/python-pep-guidance.md` |
| Deployable services | `references/cloud-native-twelve-factor.md` |
| Origin and attribution | `references/sources.md` |

Use principles as design questions, not dogma. Record context, alternatives,
consequences, and evidence. The repository's configuration and the task's
requirements remain the executable source of truth.
